profil.nama: PT Bintang Samudera Mandiri Lines Tbk
profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Bintang Samudera Mandiri Lines Tbk, together with its subsidiary, PT Bintang Samudera Mandiri Persada, provides sea transportation services for goods in Indonesia. The company offers sea transport services, such as transshipment facilities, barge loading activities, and ship cargo transportation services to vessels, as well as grab, trimming, and support equipment. It also provides logistics services, including pick-up and loading facilities on vessels; transportation on vessels; and logistics services specifically for vessels and sea loading activities. In addition, the company trades fuel products. It operates 8 tugboat units and 7 barge units. PT Bintang Samudera Mandiri Lines Tbk was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in Jakarta Selatan, Indonesia.
